title: Better String
description: Reverts the changes to string made in 26.1 snapshot 3
body:
Reverts the changes to string made in 26.1 snapshot 3.

**Previously:**
![Old String](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be5e6d051fd2e99deac22e2c2bb5fcdc9d15b74c_0.webp)
_It's ugly, it stands out, and it's no good for building, trapping, or any other reasons you might need string._

**Now:**
![New String](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac5c35562b0ad0e4af6069d4bca4ad90d84e7cb5_0.webp)
_It's practically invisible, great for building and trapping._

Install this mod on the client to see the changes, or install it on the server to force everyone else to use this mod as well - which will make everything look great not only to you but also to anyone using your server.
